chunks.text: Alvin Kao and Titan Yuan honored as Siebel Scholars - EECS at Berkeley 5th Year CS Master’s students Alvin Kao (B.S. ’19) and Titan Yuan (B.S. ’19) have been named to the Siebel Scholars Foundation’s 2020 class. Kao is working on problems in the autonomous vehicle setting, like predicting the behavior of other agents and trajectory planning. Yuan is working with the Swarm Lab on embedded software for some of the world’s tiniest wireless devices, so that they can be used as miniature temperature sensors and Bluetooth beacons. Categories Alumni Honors Research Students View Open Faculty Positions
